description: Creates a textbook-style tip or note card with an arrow line connecting from an anchor shape to the tip location. Content is in PLAIN TEXT mode by default — text renders as-is without math processing. Math expressions must be wrapped in math() to render as math.
utility: Display context-sensitive notes or tips with animated reveal effects (plain text default, use math() for math)

arguments.name: from
arguments.description: Starting position of arrow line on anchor's edge (type indicates edge: topleft, right, bottomright, etc.)

arguments.name: to
arguments.description: Position where the tip card is drawn

arguments.name: title
arguments.description: Optional title for tip card (first string argument)

arguments.name: content
arguments.description: Main content text for tip card

arguments.name: effectType
arguments.description: Animation effect: type(typewrite), type(reveal), type(slideup), type(fadescale), type(highlight), or type(blur)

alternates.description: Tip with content only, default styling
Tip with separate title and content
Tip with curve, color, and reveal animation

examples.expression: tip_1=tip(at(11,14),at(11,24),"Displacement","Displacement is the change in position of an object. It is a vector that points from the initial point (A) to the final point (B).",c(brown))
tip_1=tip(at(19,44),at(26,40),"Hint","Negative values proves that the point is inside the circle",c(teal),fc(azure),ff("Gill Sans"),border(teal,s(2),radius(8),shadow(10)))
